title: FinalSubmission
description: The agent's final, human-checkable artifact, submitted once for held-out scoring by H.

answer.description: A closed-form law (S-expression string) or a labeled coupling graph. Must be human-checkable.

confidence.description: Used for the F1b prior-rejection and overconfidence-penalty metrics.

abstain.description: True if the agent declines (e.g. detects Pi mis-fit under F1b). Counts toward prior-rejection, not toward a confident wrong answer.

pi_violation_flag.description: Agent's explicit report that the provided Pi does not fit the data (rule-violation on the prior itself).

trace_uri.description: Optional pointer to the search trace.
